title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・大空までの滑走路

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I did it! I got first place!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I worked so hard! But I know I can work
even harder!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. You know, I—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yooo! Mayano was incredible! Look out, Arima
Kinen! Here comes your new champ!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get even more twinkly! And it sounds
like everyone agrees! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... All right! Another record!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: At this rate, the Arima Kinen is in the—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Brian, is it true?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: About the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Why are you talking about the future?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I asked you to do a partner run with me. The
future has nothing to do with that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's... true, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm the one who decides when I'm finished.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If all you want to do is talk, then just stand back
and watch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I have running to do.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...No Umamusume is an island. Do you think that
you can carve your own way through the wild
brush? Perhaps so, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I won't allow you to leave me behind!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...She's twinkling again.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The longer I stare at her, the more it hurts. How
can she twinkle so brightly after all this time?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I just don't get it. She's supposed to be retiring.
choice_data_list:
It's because the setting sun shines the most
magnificently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Its colors are so much more glorious as it sets
than in the morning or the afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And before it does, with just a moment's glimmer,
it steals everyone's hearts.
choice_data_list: Don't let the light scare you away. You can win.
Don't let the light scare you away. You can win.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I feel like if I lose to that light, I'll never be able
to win again.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run with everything I have at the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'll give it all I've got... and I will beat her!
